/usr/bin/c++  -pthread -maes -march=native -fno-strict-aliasing -std=c++11 -D_GNU_SOURCE   -Wall -Wextra -Wpointer-arith -Wundef -Wvla -Wwrite-strings -Wno-error=extra -Wno-error=deprecated-declarations -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-error=unused-variable -Wno-error=undef -Wno-error=uninitialized -Wno-stringop-overflow -Wlogical-op -Wno-error=maybe-uninitialized -Wno-error=cpp -Wno-reorder -Wno-missing-field-initializers  -fPIC  -U_FORTIFY_SOURCE -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=1 -Wformat -fstack-protector -fstack-protector-strong -fcf-protection=full -fstack-clash-protection -Werror=switch -Werror=return-type -fno-strict-aliasing -ftemplate-depth=900 -DNDEBUG -Ofast    -pie -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,-z,noexecstack  CMakeFiles/daemon.dir/command_parser_executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/daemon.dir/command_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/daemon.dir/daemon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/daemon.dir/executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/daemon.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/daemon.dir/rpc_command_executor.cpp.o -o ../../bin/tiltd  /usr/lib64/librt.a /usr/lib64/libz.so -ldl ../rpc/librpc.a ../blockchain_db/libblockchain_db.a ../cryptonote_core/libcryptonote_core.a ../crypto/libcncrypto.a ../common/libcommon.a ../p2p/libp2p.a ../cryptonote_protocol/libcryptonote_protocol.a ../daemonizer/libdaemonizer.a ../serialization/libserialization.a ../rpc/libdaemon_rpc_server.a ../../contrib/epee/src/libepee_readline.a ../libversion.a /usr/lib64/libboost_chrono.so /usr/lib64/libboost_filesystem.so /usr/lib64/libboost_program_options.so /usr/lib64/libboost_regex.so /usr/lib64/libzmq.so /usr/lib64/libpgm.so /usr/lib64/libgssapi_krb5.so /usr/lib64/libsodium.so /usr/lib64/libreadline.so /usr/lib64/librt.a /usr/lib64/libz.so -ldl ../rpc/librpc.a ../rpc/librpc_base.a ../rpc/libdaemon_messages.a ../serialization/libserialization.a ../cryptonote_protocol/libcryptonote_protocol.a ../p2p/libp2p.a ../cryptonote_core/libcryptonote_core.a ../blockchain_db/libblockchain_db.a ../../external/db_drivers/liblmdb/liblmdb.a ../multisig/libmultisig.a ../ringct/libringct.a ../cryptonote_basic/libcryptonote_basic.a ../checkpoints/libcheckpoints.a ../device/libdevice.a /usr/lib64/libhidapi-libusb.so ../ringct/libringct_basic.a /usr/lib64/libboost_program_options.so ../net/libnet.a ../common/libcommon.a ../crypto/libcncrypto.a /usr/lib64/libunbound.so /usr/lib64/libboost_date_time.so /usr/lib64/libzmq.so /usr/lib64/libpgm.so /usr/lib64/libgssapi_krb5.so ../../external/easylogging++/libeasylogging.a
